chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 89 of 2019 SCRA 95 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.707/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.708/2019. 13.02.2026 Mr. Rizwan, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2019 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that no efforts have taken by the applicant to get the matter listed for last seven years. Even today seven years later counsel holding brief on behalf of applicant’s counsel merely seeks adjournment. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
